text: This review focuses on a new class of molecules, where the bonding involves purely non-covalent interactions, such as between a bare group-14 atom (C–Pb) and σ-donor ligands (L) or transition metal fragments [TM]. Modern quantum chemical methods are employed to gain detailed insight into the electronic structure and bonding in these fascinating molecules.
